title: Nap Resistance Training
description: Baby refuses nap. Practices aggressive crawling drills across the living room.

choices.flavor: Ball. Must reach ball. Blocks, stuffed animals, and books ignored. Only ball matters.

choices.text: Pull up on furniture and cruise around
choices.flavor: The coffee table is now a highway. Nothing in this house is safe.

title: High Chair Physics Lab
description: You throw food off the high chair repeatedly and study the bounce with scientific focus.

choices.flavor: Peas travel six feet. Mashed potatoes stick to the wall. Research continues.

choices.text: Laugh after each throw and do it again
choices.flavor: The joy is in the repetition. Also in making Mom's eye twitch.

title: Gravity Test
description: You fall down. Again. But you laugh and immediately try to stand back up.

choices.text: Get right back up. No crying.
choices.flavor: Floor is temporary. Standing is the mission.

choices.text: Cry briefly, then get distracted and try again
choices.flavor: Two seconds of tears, then a butterfly. Then back to walking. Emotional range.

title: Territory Dispute
description: Older sibling has a toy. You want it. Negotiation is not in your vocabulary yet.

choices.text: Grab it and hold on with surprising grip strength
choices.flavor: Tiny hands, iron will. The toy is yours now. Possession is the law.
The scream works. It always works. Lungs are developing nicely.
